insights: 15 of 20 rejections (75%) due to wrong_market_price—listings vastly overpriced vs. market
facsimile_signature and wrong_player account for 4 rejections (20%)—strict authenticity checks
Confirmed snipes are autograph cards with 82%+ delta (price $16–17 vs. market $90); rejections lack this spread
Multi-card lots, incomplete sets, and 'pick-from-list' mechanics trigger 'other' rejection 5 times
Novelty/print/custom descriptors ('INVESTMENT CARD', 'PRINT', 'NOVELTY') rejected in 3 Ohtani autos
Both confirmations are real autographs with ultra-low ask prices; rejections mix reprints, facsimiles, and inflated vintage
Griffey Jr base rejections dominated by wrong_market_price (5/8), Ohtani by pricing + parallel mismatches (4/7)
Confirmation titles are clean ('2023 Topps Tribute', 'Authentic Images'); rejections heavy on caps, emojis, hype language
